title: Add Meshtastic BLE drain/framing golden vectors
description: Why this exists: Meshtastic BLE carries raw protobuf messages and uses FromNum little-endian u32 notifications followed by repeated FromRadio reads until empty; serial/TCP stream headers must not be applied to BLE. What needs to be done: add golden vectors and tests for raw ToRadio protobuf write, FromNum notify/read-drain semantics, zero-length drain termination, and rejection of serial/TCP headers on BLE. Acceptance criteria: vectors cite meshtastic/protobufs and app behavior source commits; tests cover normal config sync, heartbeat queueStatus, text packet send, and empty queue drain.
